summary: Gate evidence closes the issue: verify flow does not promote screenshot/prose evidence into passing Visual QA, and PR gate logic requires residual-backed or explicit artifact-backed visual evidence. Residual status, stale binding, baseline_missing, baseline_updated, and high/custom residual cases remain review-blocking.
evidence_refs: flow-verifier: passing screenshot flow records auto_visual_evidence not_recorded / visual_residual_required, not visual_qa pass evidence
pr-manager: .vibepro/qa residual evidence is read before verification fallback; fallback requires visual_qa+screenshot markers plus existing png/jpeg/webp or residual artifacts
pr-manager: baseline_updated, baseline_missing, needs_review, stale binding, residual > threshold, semantic > threshold all resolve to needs_review
verification-evidence.json: all commands have strict_head binding and recorded_head_sha 656ecdcc1e1cc870382b61c84bdcfb0c7e03454e
